in this video, we re going to briefly go over our six reasons why the gen 11 might be a better purchase than the gen 12 or 13
it s designed to help you get more done without overpaying for the latest models that might not offer significant upgrades for most users
the 14 in wxga display might not be 4k, but it s sharp, bright at 400 nits, and covers 100 srgb, making it perfect for those who need accuracy and comfort for work or media
sure, the gen 12 and gen 13 have newer processors and slightly improved features, but the gen 11 still holds its own for most users

upgrading to the gen 12 or gen 13 might get you a bump in performance, but unless you need cuttingedge power for gaming or specialized tasks, the x1 carbon gen 11 is still a smart buy for anyone needing reliability, portability, and professional grade features at a better value
